name: Block High-Risk Countries
description: Blocks traffic from countries commonly associated with high volumes of cyber attacks, scanning, and credential stuffing. Based on threat intelligence from multiple sources including AbuseIPDB, Spamhaus, and SANS.
author: Ghostwire Proxy

rules.name: Block High-Risk Countries
rules.notes: China, Russia, North Korea, Iran — top sources of state-sponsored and organized cyber attacks.
